---
title: "Hitha Sunil"
subtitle: "Dissemination Ops, iSRL"
description: "Working on dissemination workflows, communication systems, and structured information delivery."
order: 4
team-role: "Dissemination Ops"
team-track: "Core Team"

image: images/hsunilofficial.jpg

about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/hsunilofficial.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: hsunilofficial@gmail.com
      href: "mailto:hsunilofficial@gmail.com"
    - icon: github
      text: hsunilofficial
      href: https://github.com/hsunilofficial
    - icon: linkedin
      text: hsunilofficial
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/hsunilofficial
---

```{=html}
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Hitha Sunil",
  "jobTitle": "Dissemination Ops",
  "description": "Working on dissemination workflows, communication systems, and structured information delivery at iSRL.",
  "url": "https://isrl-research.github.io/team/hsunilofficial.html",
  "email": "hsunilofficial@gmail.com",
  "identifier": "https://orcid.org/0009-0003-3747-7910",
  "sameAs": [
    "https://orcid.org/0009-0003-3747-7910",
    "https://github.com/hsunilofficial",
    "https://linkedin.com/in/hsunilofficial"
  ],
  "worksFor": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "iSRL",
    "url": "https://isrl-research.github.io"
  },
  "affiliation": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "IIT Madras"
  }
}
</script>
```

Dissemination Ops at iSRL, working on how research gets communicated, structured, and actually reaches people in a usable form.

My focus is on turning complex work into clear, accessible outputs, through documentation, workflows, and structured content systems. I’m particularly interested in how information moves - from raw research to something people can understand, use, and build on.

I’m also part of the technical team at Sahityika (the literary society) of IIT Madras, where I work on localization — contributing to making digital content more accessible across languages. I care deeply about breaking language barriers in digital experiences and enabling information to reach wider, more diverse audiences.

Currently pursuing BS in Data Science and Applications at IIT Madras.

Curiosity is what drives me, especially toward questions at the intersection of biology, technology, and space, and how systems across these domains scale, interact, and remain meaningful in real-world contexts.

I tend to approach things with a systems mindset, breaking down processes, improving consistency, and building routines that actually sustain over time rather than just working once.

Outside the lab: walking routines, fitness discipline, structured schedules, and exploring how small habits compound into long-term change.

I’m interested in building systems that don’t just work once, but keep working consistently over time.
